findings.evidence: AbelJacobi.lean:52-56 defines weightedAbelJacobiClass via weightedPointBaseDifference w x₀ x; WeilDivisor.lean:500 weightedPointBaseDifference w x₀ x := ofPoint x - w x • ofPoint x₀; the PR proves the unweighted equivalence at BasepointChange.lean:218-223.
findings.fix: Define weightedBasepointChangeClass as S.weightedAbelJacobiClass w hdeg hy₀ x₀ (or add the weighted analogue of unweightedAbelJacobiClass_eq_basepointChangeClass and derive the swap/add/self lemmas from existing AJ API) to avoid a parallel definition.
findings.issue: weightedBasepointChangeClass w hdeg hx₀ hy₀ has value divisorClass (pointDifference x₀ y₀), which equals weightedAbelJacobiClass w hdeg hy₀ x₀ (value divisorClass (weightedPointBaseDifference w y₀ x₀) = divisorClass (ofPoint x₀ - w x₀ • ofPoint y₀), and w x₀ = 1 by hx₀). The new def is the existing AJ class with point/base swapped; both inhabit picZero w hdeg.

findings.evidence: BasepointChange.lean unweightedAbelJacobiClass_eq_basepointChangeClass proves the two coincide; AbelJacobi.lean:99-109 defines unweightedAbelJacobiClass with value divisorClass (pointDifference x x₀).
findings.fix: Define unweightedBasepointChangeClass hdeg x₀ y₀ := S.unweightedAbelJacobiClass hdeg y₀ x₀ and derive its swap/add/self lemmas from the existing AJ lemmas rather than reproving them.
findings.issue: unweightedBasepointChangeClass duplicates unweightedAbelJacobiClass with arguments swapped, as the PR's own unweightedAbelJacobiClass_eq_basepointChangeClass shows (unweightedAbelJacobiClass hdeg y x = unweightedBasepointChangeClass hdeg x y).

summary: The new basepoint-change classes are a parallel re-packaging of the existing Abel-Jacobi class with point and base swapped; their values are provably equal and the file only records the equivalence in the unweighted case.
